name: Chewy Monkey Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine marshmallows, honey, butter, peanut butter, vanilla, and salt in a medium saucepan.
2. Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly until all ingredients are well combined.
3. In a 13x9x2-inch baking pan, mix together oats, rice cereal, coconut, and peanuts.
4. Pour the heated honey mixture over the dry ingredients in the baking pan.
5. Mix thoroughly to ensure all dry ingredients are coated evenly with the honey mixture.
6. Pack the mixture firmly into the baking pan.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely before cutting it into 24 bars.
